bempl.body: Key | p in k.~owns and r = k.opened_by
Key | p in k.~owns and k.opened_by = r
Key | p in k.~owns and k.opened_by in r

dll.body: all n: Node - nxt.Node | n.elem <= n.nxt.elem
all n: Node | lone n.nxt implies n.elem <= n.nxt.elem
all n: Node - Node.nxt | n.elem <= n.nxt.elem
all n: Node | n.nxt in Node implies n.elem <= n.nxt.elem
all n: Node | n.nxt in Node implies n.nxt.elem >= n.elem

arr.body: Element | e in Array.i2e.Int implies lone (Array.i2e).e

balancedBST.body: all n : Node {n.left.^(left + right).elem < n.elem and n.right.^(left + right).elem > n.elem}
all n : Node {n.left.^(left+right).elem < n.elem and n.right.^(left+right).elem > n.elem and (no n.left or n.left.elem < n.elem) and (no n.right or n.right.elem > n.elem)}
all n : Node {no (n.left.^(left + right)) & {m : Node | m.elem >= n.elem} and no (n.right.^(left + right)) & {m : Node | m.elem <= n.elem}}
all n : Node {n.left.^(left + right).elem !in {e: Int | e >= n.elem} and n.right.^(left + right).elem !in {e: Int | e <= n.elem}}
(no n.left or no n.right) and (n.left != n.right)
(n.left in Node implies n.right not in Node) or (n.right in Node implies n.left not in Node) or (no n.left and no n.right)
all n1 : Node, n2 : Node {HasAtMostOneChild[n1] and HasAtMostOneChild[n2] implies Depth[n1] - Depth[n2] <= 1 and Depth[n2] - Depth[n1] <= 1}
all n1, n2 : Node {HasAtMostOneChild[n1] and HasAtMostOneChild[n2] implies (Depth[n1] = Depth[n2] or Depth[n1] = Depth[n2] + 1 or Depth[n2] = Depth[n1] + 1)}
all n1, n2 : Node {HasAtMostOneChild[n1] and HasAtMostOneChild[n2] implies #{n1.*~(left + right)} - #{n2.*~(left + right)} <= 1 and #{n2.*~(left + right)} - #{n1.*~(left + right)} <= 1}
all n1, n2 : Node {HasAtMostOneChild[n1] and HasAtMostOneChild[n2] implies #{n1.*~(left + right)} in #{n2.*~(left + right)} + (-1 + 1)}

student.body: all n: Node | n not in n.^link
all n: Node | n !in n.^link
all n: Node | n.^link & n = none
all n: Node | n.^link in Node - n
all n: Node - link.Node | n.elem <= n.link.elem
all n: Node | (n -> n.link in link) implies n.elem <= n.link.elem
all n: Node | n.link.elem - n.elem >= 0 or no n.link
result = #(x.~elem)
result = #({n: Node | n.elem = x})
result = #(Node & x.~elem)
result = #({n: Node | n.elem in x})
result = #({n: Node | n -> x in elem})
result = #{n: Node | n.elem = x}
result = #({n: Node | x = n.elem})
result = #(elem & Node -> x)
(x in Node.elem and result = True) or (x not in Node.elem and result = False)
result = True and x in Node.elem or result = False and x not in Node.elem
x in Node.elem <=> result = True
(x in Node.elem and result = True) or (x !in Node.elem and result = False)
result = True <=> x in Node.elem
result = True and x in elem.Node or result = False and x not in elem.Node
result = True and some x.~elem or result = False and no x.~elem
x in Node.elem implies result = True and result = True implies x in Node.elem
result = True and (x in Node.elem) or result = False and not (x in Node.elem)

other.body: Group | g in p.member_of and g in r.located_in
Group | p->g in member_of and r->g in located_in
p.member_of & r.located_in in alas + peds + (Group - alas - peds)
